response.justification: Bogdan has over 6 years of experience as a full-stack engineer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, directly matching the role's primary stack. He has worked on complex projects, contributed to AI-agent infrastructure, and demonstrated proficiency in multiple programming languages and technologies required by the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with relevant technologies
Proven ability to work on complex projects and contribute to AI infrastructure
Strong background in multiple programming languages and technologies
concerns: Some experience is outside the primary stack, though still relevant
Less direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest, though familiar with similar technologies
Some projects and roles were not directly related to enterprise internal tooling
